reviews.review_title: The game saved my soccer team
reviews.review_description: My life is all about soccer and I will say that this game is the best soccer goalie training game. I thought it was just for fun but no, one level saved my soccer team how? I knew that this kid was exactly preforming my easyest level so I saved that shot in the final minutes and that’s why recommend this soccer goalie training program for soccer kids.
No multiplayer b word even no kicking ball a word

developer_response.body: I don't understand your comment. You have the multiplayer game mode included for free using the Final kick game in your phone (also free) If you need help write us to support@ivanovichgames.com and we'll happy to help you

reviews.review_description: I'm not sure how to explain this, but I keep seeing like pixelated squares during load and gameplay. The whole gameplay gets very uncomfortable with in-game movements.

If you’re playing this game professionally or for real goalkeeper practice, you need a LOT of space, when I played this game I smashed my head into the ceiling and jumped straight into the wall. For the best experience, play this game outside, but be warned: don’t let the sun shine on your VR lenses!
It's very fun but I fell down on my head had a concussion but it's really good just need some space
I can dive and many asked for dive button but who cares about DIVE button. Just be a real keeper and dive

It was pretty go but it would be better if you had a button to dive in stead of doing it in real life because I nearly broke my headset and controllers and I broke my window so please and a button to dive thank you.
Banged my head when trying to block

UPDATED REVIEW:

After I saw that the devs updated the game, I knew I owed them at least another chance and that’s why although I’ve already uninstalled the game, I reinstalled it knowing they fixed the problem with the gloves which was the main reason I gave it 3 stars to begin with because it was frustrating and almost made the game unplayable. Now that the gloves has been fixed and working as they should the game is extremely fun to play and definitely deserves the ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ that the devs are hoping for. Sure the game still requires more space than what I currently have even when I tried to make adjustments by playing diagonally in the 8ft x 8ft playing space that I have to block the corner shots close to the side poles and the game itself is still pretty short and limited, nonetheless it’s really fun and challenging enough that I won’t take away a star for that. Amazing game devs and thank you so much again for fixing the gloves, because it really made all the difference in allowing us to truly enjoy the game as you intended. I truly hope that the full version will be added to the Quest and if not, can’t thank you enough for letting us try it and have a fantastic time playing. Thanks again! 😉🙌🏻🥂

=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*=

Original Review:

As much as I want to love this game it’s impossible at its current state. Sure I like the concept and I did enjoy playing, but like the other reviewers had pointed out the gloves are bent which meant that I had to hold the controllers in an awkward position just to get them to look normal/straight in the game which also made it difficult to truly enjoy the game and on top of that although I already have an 8ft x 8ft play area, it’s still not big enough to guard the entire goal area, and sure enough when the shotss were made really close to the pole which was right on the boarder of the play area there’s no way for me to block the shots and that gets old really fast since the game ends when they score 3 goals. I understand that the devs wants to see how many 5 star ratings they’ll get to see if there’s enough interest/demand before they’ll decide whether or not to add the full version for the Quest which I find hard to imagine them getting their desired number of 5 star ratings when the game is way too limited and the gloves are not even calibrated correctly. Thankfully BF SuperPlayer was released recently which works like a charm and has both keeper and header games that’s extremely fun, realistic and immersive to play, so for now I’ll just have to uninstall this game since I will most likely not play it again given the issues I had mentioned and BF SuperPlayer offers what this game has to offer but it’s a hundred times better so there’s no point of me keeping this game especially if the devs are hesitant to work on improving the game unless they can justify that there’s enough demand. Good luck devs and thanks again for letting us try this game, like I said it’s fun but not polished enough to make me want to play it again. I truly wish that everything worked as they should for you to get all the 5 stars you wanted, but sadly this needs some updates to at least be able hold the controllers naturally without the gloves looking demented in the game.
So diffuclt because u guys dont include headers and arms also body please fix

developer_response.body: We have just published an update including the goalkeeper's body. If you could change your rating, we would greatly appreciate it.
